title: duplicate item view
excerpt: Duplicating item views is helpful so I don’t have to re-create my view each and every time. We use multiple views to showcase different elements of the item so as not to clunk one view with too much information.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: Duplicating item views is helpful so I don’t have to re-create my view each and every time. We use multiple views to showcase different elements of the item so as not to clunk one view with too much information.
